---
title: "Notes in git"
format: html
---

## Using git 

git is a command line version control system. We can use it from Rstudio (via the "git pane" in the upper left) or from teh command line (i.e. in the "Terminal tab"). 

The steps to using git involve:

- Initiate a git repository 
    git init
    or click the little box in Rstudio

- Do your work (same as always)
    add files
    edit files 
    save files 
  
- **Add files you care about to the "stage"**
    git add yourfilename
    click to add to "stage" in Rstudio
    
- **Commit your changes**
    git commit -m "your wee msg"
    click "commit" button in Rstudio
